meta.description: Documentação dos vocabulários CGI/IUGS Lithology disponíveis e mapeamento Geolytics atual.
meta.note: Geolytics usa primariamente CGI Simple Lithology 201211 (data/cgi-lithology.json — 437 conceitos). CGI 2016.01 SimpleLithology (266 conceitos hierárquicos) é alvo secundário para conceitos faltantes (ex.: doleritic_rock para IB3).

cgi_versions.structure: Inclui QAPF (igneous classification grid) — granular para rochas magmáticas
cgi_versions.use_case: Default — vocabulário primário de litologia em Layer 1b

cgi_versions.structure: Hierarchical — broader/narrower/related com skos:example listando termos comuns (e.g. doleritic_rock includes dolerite/diabase/microdiorite/microgabbro)
cgi_versions.use_case: Fallback for concepts missing from 201211 — query when 201211 returns no match

cross_version_notes.decision: Mapped to CGI 2016.01 doleritic_rock (skos:example "dolerite") because 201211 lacks dedicated dolerite concept

cross_version_notes.glosis_pattern: aggregator concepts (II1, MA2, MA3, MB1, SC1, SC2, SO1)
cross_version_notes.decision: Use 1:N mapping over 201211 individual lithotypes (existing approach in lithology-crosswalk-cgi.json)
cross_version_notes.rationale: 201211 has finer lithotype granularity than 2016.01 — better for these aggregators

recommended_query_pattern.description: When mapping a GLOSIS lithology code to CGI, query both vocabularies in fallback order:
